text.message: Tell me. Im going last here :(

Ya either of those could work
If I leave it open, would you take 6 4 3 over 5 10?
I meant u could take it since I wanted the 643 but shoot now I feel like I gotta do the other…
Why 7 first roll hate being the bad guy
Oh ya I could have done that lol
I need wood and brick more
Didn't feel like the time to solo 6 wheat yet
You will city and spiral up
I’m on only like 3 numbers and they’ll stop rolling
No wheat yet but when I do I’ll trade that
I will go to 5 take road will be gang robbed and end last with 7 pts

Ok let’s gang up on blue lol
I'm alternating from you to black
Just happens I rolled a few 7s
Why me though? Not really a threat
I’m just trying to trade so I can do something and not be bored
Once j city u will be
Blue way bigger threat come on u said it yourself
I see a player with best ore, only wheat, strong sheep
Yet he’s already at 6 so change your focus lol
He’ll get road and no one will stop him

U want him to take road?
Cuz u stole from me a couple times had to do it once

Need to rob your ows competition
No, orange needs to rob red
Ya too late u guys should of focused blue harder and black road was on you bro
Want me to cut him off?
